item.title: Missry Associates Recalls Misco Sports Badminton Toy Sets Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Battery Ingestion; Violates Mandatory Standard for Toys
item.company: Menard's stores nationwide from January 2026 through March 2026 for about $10.
item.brand: Menard's stores nationwide from January 2026 through March 2026 for about $10.
item.product: Misco Sports Badminton Toy Sets Red/Blue MT2383
item.summary: This recall involves Misco Sports Badminton Toy Sets (MT2383). The badminton toy sets come in blue and red and with a light up shuttlecock. The Badminton Toy Sets (MT2383) have "MT2383" and "100125" printed on products located on black handles in white color letters.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Misco Sports Badminton Toy Sets Red/Blue MT2383.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the badminton toy set immediately, take the shuttlecock away from children and contact Missry Associates for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to dispose of the badminton toy set with the shuttlecock (number MT2383) in the trash and send the photo to help@misco.us. Note: Button cell and coin batteries are hazardous. Batteries should be disposed of or recycled by following local hazardous waste procedures.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
